title: Detailed report of all Automations across all account boards (Like doing an inventory)
excerpt: Hello, I would like to see Monday.com reporting like a DETAILED list of automations for every board and every workspace in our account.  More reporting in general also.  Reporting like a topology of all boards from all w…

posts.author: Booster (Richard Muniz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I would like to see Monday.com reporting like a DETAILED list of automations for every board and every workspace in our account. More reporting in general also. Reporting like a topology of all boards from all workspaces and specifically mention which boards are connected/mirroring.
